'''鈭歨-j-s''' ('''kahajas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:joosh|joosh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joosh|joosh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-j-s
|-
! Lemma
| kahajas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihajas|thihajas]] || [[word:jihajas|jihajas]] || [[word:shihajas|shihajas]] || [[word:kihajas|kihajas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhajas|thuthuhajas]] || [[word:jujuhajas|jujuhajas]] || [[word:shushuhajas|shushuhajas]] || [[word:kukuhajas|kukuhajas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhajas|thuhajas]] || [[word:juhajas|juhajas]] || [[word:shuhajas|shuhajas]] || [[word:kuhajas|kuhajas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhajas|thuhajas]] || [[word:juhajas|juhajas]] || [[word:shuhajas|shuhajas]] || [[word:kuhajas|kuhajas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehajas|thehajas]] || [[word:jehajas|jehajas]] || [[word:shehajas|shehajas]] || [[word:kehajas|kehajas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohajas|thothohajas]] || [[word:jojohajas|jojohajas]] || [[word:shoshohajas|shoshohajas]] || [[word:kokohajas|kokohajas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohajas|thohajas]] || [[word:johajas|johajas]] || [[word:shohajas|shohajas]] || [[word:kohajas|kohajas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohajas|thohajas]] || [[word:johajas|johajas]] || [[word:shohajas|shohajas]] || [[word:kohajas|kohajas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]] || [[word:hajas|hajas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙hajas|th忙hajas]] || [[word:j忙hajas|j忙hajas]] || [[word:sh忙hajas|sh忙hajas]] || [[word:k忙hajas|k忙hajas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahajas|thathahajas]] || [[word:jajahajas|jajahajas]] || [[word:shashahajas|shashahajas]] || [[word:kakahajas|kakahajas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahajas|thahajas]] || [[word:jahajas|jahajas]] || [[word:shahajas|shahajas]] || [[word:kahajas|kahajas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahajas|thahajas]] || [[word:jahajas|jahajas]] || [[word:shahajas|shahajas]] || [[word:kahajas|kahajas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahajas|shahajas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahajas|goshahajas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahajas|gokishahajas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahajasn眉|shahajasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahajasnkn眉|goshahajasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahajasn眉|gokishahajasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahajassh毛|shahajassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahajasnksh毛|goshahajasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahajassh毛|gokishahajassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahajasro|shahajasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahajasnkro|goshahajasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahajasro|gokishahajasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahajasmu|shahajasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahajasnkmu|goshahajasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahajasmu|gokishahajasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahajassher|shahajassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahajasnksher|goshahajasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahajassher|gokishahajassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahajasng|shahajasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahajasnkng|goshahajasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahajasng|gokishahajasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahajasya|shahajasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahajasnkya|goshahajasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahajasya|gokishahajasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahajasyam|shahajasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahajasnkyam|goshahajasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahajasyam|gokishahajasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahajasn眉sh毛|shahajasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahajasnkn眉sh毛|goshahajasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahajasn眉sh毛|gokishahajasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahajasn眉ro|shahajasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahajasnkn眉ro|goshahajasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahajasn眉ro|gokishahajasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahajasn眉mu|shahajasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahajasnkn眉mu|goshahajasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahajasn眉mu|gokishahajasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahajassh毛n眉|shahajassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahajasnksh毛n眉|goshahajasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahajassh毛n眉|gokishahajassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahajassh毛ro|shahajassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahajasnksh毛ro|goshahajasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahajassh毛ro|gokishahajassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahajassh毛mu|shahajassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahajasnksh毛mu|goshahajasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahajassh毛mu|gokishahajassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahajasron眉|shahajasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahajasnkron眉|goshahajasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahajasron眉|gokishahajasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahajasrosh毛|shahajasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahajasnkrosh毛|goshahajasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahajasrosh毛|gokishahajasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahajasromu|shahajasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahajasnkromu|goshahajasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahajasromu|gokishahajasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahajasmun眉|shahajasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahajasnkmun眉|goshahajasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahajasmun眉|gokishahajasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahajasmush毛|shahajasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahajasnkmush毛|goshahajasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahajasmush毛|gokishahajasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahajasmuro|shahajasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahajasnkmuro|goshahajasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahajasmuro|gokishahajasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
